---
title: "IMC-heart"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries and setup

```{r}
.libPaths("/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(cytomapper)
  library(EBImage)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(SpatialExperiment)
  library(simpleSeg)
  library(ggiraph)
})
```


```{r}
masks = readRDS("./data/heart/masksList.rds")
masks
```

```{r}
heartSPE = readRDS("./data/heart/heartSPE_annotated.rds")
heartSPE
```

## Calculate variance

```{r eval = F}
images = loadImages(x = "./data/heart/ROIs/",
                    single_channel = TRUE,
                    on_disk = FALSE,
                    BPPARAM = BiocParallel::MulticoreParam(workers = 20))

# remove metal antibody tag
channelNames(images) = sub("^[0-9]+[A-Za-z]+_", "", channelNames(images))

# remove excluded images
mcols(images) = S4Vectors::DataFrame(ROI = names(images))
images = images[names(masks)]

saveRDS(images, "./data/heart/imagesList.rds")
```


```{r eval = F}
# measure sd
spe = measureObjects(mask = masks,
                           image = images, 
                           img_id = "ROI",
                           return_as = "spe",
                           feature_types = "basic",
                           basic_feature = "sd",
                           BPPARAM = BiocParallel::MulticoreParam(workers = 20))
```

```{r eval = F}
# remove some of the noisy ROIs 
spe = spe[, !spe$ROI %in% c("ROI04", "ROI08")]

varMat = assay(spe, "counts_sd")^2
assay(heartSPE, "var", withDimnames = FALSE) = varMat
saveRDS(heartSPE, "./data/heart/heartSPE_annotated.rds")
```


## Calculate pixel-level correlation

```{r}
computePixelCorrelations = function(images, masks, 
                                    method = "pearson",
                                    minPixels = 3,
                                    BPPARAM = BiocParallel::SerialParam()) {
  
  chNames = channelNames(images)
  nChannels = length(chNames)
  
  # precompute pair names once
  dummyMat = matrix(0, nChannels, nChannels, dimnames = list(chNames, chNames))
  idx = which(upper.tri(dummyMat), arr.ind = TRUE)
  pairNames = paste(chNames[idx[, 1]], chNames[idx[, 2]], sep = "_vs_")
  
  # process one image — will be parallelised across images
  processImage = function(imgName) {
    
    imgArr  = imageData(images[[imgName]])   # [x, y, channels]
    maskArr = imageData(masks[[imgName]])    # [x, y]
    cellIDs = setdiff(unique(as.vector(maskArr)), 0)
    
    # process one cell
    processCell = function(cell) {
      cellPixels = which(maskArr == cell, arr.ind = TRUE)
      if (nrow(cellPixels) < minPixels) return(NULL)
      
      pixelMat = sapply(seq_len(nChannels), function(ch) {
        imgArr[cbind(cellPixels, ch)]
      })
      colnames(pixelMat) = chNames
      
      corMat = suppressWarnings(cor(pixelMat, method = method))
      setNames(corMat[upper.tri(corMat)], pairNames)
    }
    
    cellResults = lapply(cellIDs, processCell)
    names(cellResults) = paste(imgName, cellIDs, sep = "_")
    
    # drop NULLs (cells below minPixels threshold)
    cellResults[!sapply(cellResults, is.null)]
  }
  
  # parallelise across images
  imageResults = bplapply(names(images), processImage, BPPARAM = BPPARAM)
  
  # flatten nested list and bind into matrix
  allResults = do.call(c, imageResults)
  do.call(rbind, allResults)
}
```

```{r eval = F}
corMat = computePixelCorrelations(images = images,
  masks = masks,
  method = "pearson",
  minPixels = 3,
  BPPARAM = BiocParallel::MulticoreParam(workers = 20))

saveRDS(corMat, "./data/heart/corMat.rds")
```

```{r}
corMat = readRDS("./data/heart/corMat.rds")
```

```{r}
# drop ROI04 and ROI08
corMat = corMat[!grepl("ROI04|ROI08", rownames(corMat)), ]

dim(corMat)
corMat[1:5, 1:5]
```

## Variance of CD3

```{r}
heartSPE$celltype |> unique()
```

```{r}
rownames(heartSPE)
```


```{r}
varDf = heartSPE |> 
  join_features(features = c("CD3", "CD20", "Vimentin", "MPO", "CD31"), shape = "wide", assay = "var") |> 
  colData() |> as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::rename(var_CD3 = CD3, var_CD20 = CD20, var_Vimentin = Vimentin, var_MPO = MPO, var_CD31 = CD31) |> 
  dplyr::select(c("var_CD3", "var_CD20", "var_Vimentin", "var_MPO", "var_CD31"))

meanDf = heartSPE |> 
  join_features(features = c("CD3", "CD20", "Vimentin", "MPO", "CD31"), shape = "wide", assay = "counts") |> 
  colData() |> as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::rename(mean_CD3 = CD3, mean_CD20 = CD20, mean_Vimentin = Vimentin, mean_MPO = MPO, mean_CD31 = CD31)

df = cbind(meanDf, varDf)

capVal = function(x, p = 0.99) pmin(x, quantile(x, p, na.rm = TRUE))

p1 = ggplot(df, aes(x = mean_CD3, y = mean_CD20, colour = var_CD3,
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "Mean CD3", y = "Mean CD20", title = "All cells coloured by variance of CD3")

p2 = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_CD3), y = log10(mean_CD20), colour = log10(var_CD3),
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean CD3)", y = "log10(Mean CD20)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of log10(CD3)")

girafe(ggobj = p2, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)

```

```{r}
library(patchwork)

p2 = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_CD3), y = log10(mean_CD20), colour = log10(var_CD3),
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean CD3)", y = "log10(Mean CD20)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of log10(CD3)")

p3 = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_CD3), y = log10(var_CD3), colour = log10(var_CD3),
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean CD3)", y = "log10(Var CD3)", title = "Mean vs Variance of CD3")

combinedPlot = wrap_plots(p2, p3, ncol = 2)

girafe(ggobj = combinedPlot,
       width_svg = 12, height_svg = 4,
       options = list(
         opts_hover(css = "fill-opacity:1; stroke:black; stroke-width:0.5px;"),
         opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity:0.05;")
       ))
```


```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_CD3) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(ROI)
```


```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_CD3) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(celltype)
```


## Variance of CD20

```{r}
p1 = ggplot(df, aes(x = mean_CD3, y = mean_CD20, colour = var_CD20,
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "Mean CD3", y = "Mean CD20", title = "All cells coloured by variance of CD20")

p2 = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_CD3), y = log10(mean_CD20), colour = log10(var_CD20),
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean CD3)", y = "log10(Mean CD20)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of log10(CD20)")

# mean/variance plot using ggiraf
# pairs plot for all markers
girafe(ggobj = p2, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
p2 = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_CD3), y = log10(mean_CD20), colour = celltype,
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  # scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean CD3)", y = "log10(Mean CD20)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of log10(CD20)")

# mean/variance plot using ggiraf
# pairs plot for all markers
# check where the CD3/CD20/Vimentin population comes from, which prototype 
girafe(ggobj = p2, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
p2 = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_Vimentin), y = log10(mean_CD20), colour = celltype,
                    tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype,
                                     "\nROI: ", ROI),
                    data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  # scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean CD3)", y = "log10(Mean CD20)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of log10(CD20)")

# mean/variance plot using ggiraf
# pairs plot for all markers
girafe(ggobj = p2, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_CD20) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(ROI)
```

```{r}
# also mostly concentrated in this mixed CD3+ CD20+ Vimentin+ population
df |> filter(log10(var_CD20) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(celltype)
```

### ROI05

ROI05 did have this problem of squished together CD20/CD3/Vimentin cells.


```{r}
p = df |> filter(ROI == "ROI05") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = log10(var_CD20),
             tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
             data_id = object_id)) +
  geom_point_interactive() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "ROI05")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 10, height_svg = 7)
```

What are the high CD20 variance cell types in ROI05?

```{r}
df |> filter(ROI == "ROI05" & log10(var_CD20) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(celltype)
```


## Variance of Vimentin

```{r}
p = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_Vimentin), y = log10(mean_CD3), colour = log10(var_Vimentin),
                   tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
                   data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean Vimentin)", y = "log10(Mean CD3)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of Vimentin (log10 scale)")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
p = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_Vimentin), y = log10(mean_CD20), colour = log10(var_Vimentin),
                   tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
                   data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean Vimentin)", y = "log10(Mean CD20)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of Vimentin (log10 scale)")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_Vimentin) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(ROI) |> arrange(-n)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_Vimentin) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(celltype) |> arrange(-n)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_Vimentin) > -9.5 & ROI == "ROI05") |> dplyr::count(celltype) |> arrange(-n)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_Vimentin) > -9.5 & ROI == "ROI33") |> dplyr::count(celltype) |> arrange(-n)
```



### ROI05

```{r}
p = df |> filter(ROI == "ROI05") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = log10(var_Vimentin),
             tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
             data_id = object_id)) +
  geom_point_interactive() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "ROI05")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 8, height_svg = 6)
```


### ROI33


```{r fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}
p = df |> filter(ROI == "ROI33") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = log10(var_Vimentin),
             tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
             data_id = object_id)) +
  geom_point_interactive() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "ROI33")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 8, height_svg = 4)
```

## Variance of MPO

```{r}
p = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_MPO), y = log10(mean_CD31), colour = log10(var_MPO),
                   tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
                   data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean MPO)", y = "log10(Mean CD31)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of MPO (log10 scale)")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_MPO) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(ROI) |> arrange(-n)
```

```{r}
# endothelial cells and neutrophils are the biggest culprits
df |> filter(log10(var_MPO) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(celltype) |> arrange(-n)
```

### ROI22

```{r}
p = df |> filter(ROI == "ROI22") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = log10(var_MPO),
             tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
             data_id = object_id)) +
  geom_point_interactive() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "ROI22")

girafe(ggobj = p)
```

```{r}
# endothelial cells and neutrophils are the biggest culprits
df |> filter(log10(var_MPO) > -9.5 & ROI == "ROI22") |> dplyr::count(celltype) |> arrange(-n)
```

## Variance of CD31

```{r}
p = ggplot(df, aes(x = log10(mean_MPO), y = log10(mean_CD31), colour = log10(var_CD31),
                   tooltip = paste0("Celltype: ", celltype, "\nROI: ", ROI),
                   data_id = rownames(df))) +
  geom_point_interactive(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_colour_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu") +
  labs(x = "log10(Mean MPO)", y = "log10(Mean CD31)", title = "All cells coloured by variance of CD31 (log10 scale)")

girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 4)
```

```{r}
df |> filter(log10(var_CD31) > -9.5) |> dplyr::count(ROI) |> arrange(-n)
```
